title: Whirlpool India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Whirlpool India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
